title: mesua macrocarpa
intro: Mesua macrocarpa, also known as the velvet tree or cempaka, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Mesua macrocarpa include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and improving respiratory health. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of extracts, teas, and infusions, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including coughs and colds.
